academy.seoTitle: Learn — GMP / QC / QA lessons & learning paths
academy.seoDesc: Every Life Science Atlas lesson in one place: structured learning paths plus an in-depth library covering sterility, validation, data integrity, environmental monitoring, investigations, and biologics QC.
academy.title: Learn
academy.subtitle: One place to learn: follow a structured path from fundamentals to audit-ready, or dive into the in-depth library — sterility assurance, validation, data integrity, environmental monitoring, investigations, and biologics QC.
academy.librarySubtitle: Long-form lessons on GMP, sterility, investigations, and audit readiness.
academy.guidedSubtitle: Structured microbiology QC lessons with built-in quizzes — search and filter this set below.

tools.seoDesc: Free interactive QC/QA tools: endotoxin limit & MVD, cleaning validation MACO, process capability (Cpk), audit readiness, sterility method, OOS decision tree, and more.
tools.title: QC/QA Tools & Calculators
tools.subtitle: Free, interactive calculators and decision tools for the work you actually do — endotoxin limits, cleaning validation, process capability, audit readiness, and more. Pick a tool to get started.

compliance.seoDesc: GMP and Annex 1 audit prep: topic intelligence, inspection questions, evidence-backed answers — for QC/QA Pharma.
compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Build Annex 1 and GMP inspection readiness through topic intelligence, strong answers, and evidence-backed audit thinking.

vault.title: Saved Intelligence
vault.subtitle: A local workspace for lessons, audit answers, case studies, and quick investigation notes. No account or backend required.
vault.notePlaceholder: Hypothesis, evidence gap, CAPA idea, or audit concern...

career.seoDesc: Career roadmap from QC Microbiologist to QA Manager: skill map, salary guide, and the Career Starter Kit for Pharma & Life Science.
career.title: Career Hub
career.subtitle: Chart your career pathway. Analyze your skill gaps. Download the resources you need to get hired.
